TextENGNew: *CRAAACK*!!!
``Th-that's impossible...?!``
This time, Kameda-kun sank to his knees right there on the mound and crumpled.
Rena's third home run of the day sailed in a high arc toward center field and vanished from sight.
changeReason: New translation specifies 'home run' for JPN アーチ (arch, baseball term for home run), where original just said 'hit,' which could mean any type of contact.

TextENGNew: ``K-Keiichi-san...?``
``Don't worry about a thing!@k@vS07/01/330100338. I'll show you all my true poweeer!!``
With that, I stepped up to the plate, squeezed the grip tight, and raised the bat with every ounce of fighting spirit I had.
``All right, bring it on from wherever you waaant!!!``
``I told you sooooo~~!!@k@vS07/04/330400256. After all that big talk, you whiffed seven pitches in a row -- what is wrong with youuuu~~?!!``
changeReason: JPN ７球連続空振り means 'swung and missed 7 pitches in a row,' not 'struck out 7 times' (which would be 7 at-bats). New translation correctly uses 'whiffed seven pitches.'

TextENGNew: ``I-I'm sorr... Gah?!``
``I-it wasn't supposed to go like... Oof?!``
``C-come on, just let me expl... Bwuh?!``
``...This is your punishment.@k@vS07/05/330500180. Any fool who betrays our expectations deserves the full brunt of our wrath~!!``
``Gwuh! Gah! Urgh! Bleh!!``
Facing a serious Rena with no plan whatsoever, what awaited me was nothing short of a devastating, one-sided rout.
What followed was a thorough beating from the club members, euphemistically called 'punishment.'
``You know... it's like the rough welcome players give a batter when he comes home after hitting a walk-off home run, right?``
``...Now imagine the exact opposite of that, filled with 'hatred' and 'fury.'``
``Even so, aren't there some pretty strange weapons mixed in here?``
...At any rate, afterward Satoko and Rika managed to persuade Coach with their 'Killer Crocodile Tears Strategy,' and we were able to lift the magatama's curse on Rena.

However, the price for this was that they had to tearfully accept the condition of 'Satoko and Rika-chan serving in maid outfits,' and the two who bore the brunt of that deal were especially full of bitter resentment and looking to take it out on me--
--Ow! Ow, ow, owwwww?!
``Well, I suppose that settles things for now... right?``
``N-no, things are NOT settled for me!@k@vS07/01/330100345. S-somebody, help meeeee~~!!@k@vS07/01/330100346. Renaaaa~~!!``
``...Hau?@k@vS07/02/330200313. Keiichi-kun, did you do something bad? Something bad?``
Rena threw a fastball with every last ounce of her strength.
And I answered it with a full swing, putting everything I had behind it.
...The ball sailed deep into the outfield, carried far beyond anyone's reach...
``...And so!@k@vS07/10/331000184. The home run derby ends at 3 to 3 -- a tie!@k@vS07/10/331000185. However, since Ryuugu-san has conceded, victory goes to the club team!!``
``Yeeeesssss!!``
...In stark contrast to our eruption of triumph, Rena hung her head in dejection.
That last pitch she threw to me... truly was, in every sense, the pitch into which she had poured her very soul.
After releasing that final throw, Rena sank to her knees on the mound, as though she had given every last drop of energy she had...

Even so, she desperately tried to rise and keep fighting, but Coach could not bear to watch any longer. He issued one final 'order from her master,' commanding the reluctant Rena to surrender -- and at last, it was over.
``Aaaaahhh... Hau... We loooost......``

``Not at all!@k@vS07/10/331000187. You may have lost the match, but Rena-san, you fought magnificently all on your own!@k@vS07/10/331000188. If the other side had been fighting under the same conditions, our victory would have been overwhelming!``
``No, this was never about winning or losing.@k@vS07/10/331000190. It was truly splendid -- for me, this was the most fulfilling experience I could have asked for!``

``It pains me to lose such a wonderful maid, but this has only strengthened my ambition to make the Maid-ification Project a reality!!@k@vS07/10/331000192. Ryuugu-san, thank you for this WONDERFUL DREAM!!``
``We may have won the match, but somehow it feels like we lost in every other way.``
``...Heh heh heh. That's Rena for you, I guess.@k@vS07/01/330100349. ...*Yaaawn*...@k@vS07/01/330100350. Now that the tension's gone, the exhaustion is hitting me all at once...``
``Oh right, I promised to return this keychain, didn't I... Oopsie?!``
``Ah, I'm so sorry!!``

When Coach pinched the magatama out of his uniform pocket, it slipped right through his fingers and went flying! And... wh-why did it have to come hurtling straight toward me at the exact moment I was yawning with my mouth wide open?!
``Ngah?!``
``Nggulp!!!``
``Aaaaaahh?!``
``I-I-I swallowed iiiiit!!``

``Wh-WHAT?!@k@vS07/03/330300180. What are you doing, Kei-chan?!@k@vS07/03/330300181. Spit it out, spit it out!!@k@vS07/03/330300182. This ol' man'll punch you in the gut -- Satoko, hold his arms back!!@k@vS07/03/330300183. Take that -- wham, wham!!``
``Gueh, gwah!!@k@vS07/01/330100356. P-please stoooop!!``
``Hold still and take iiiiiit!!``
changeReason: JPN 神妙になさいませ means 'hold still/accept your fate,' not 'be quiet.' New translation correctly captures the command to submit to punishment.

TextENGNew: ``Fghoh, gwehh!!@k@vS07/01/330100358. Body blows always catch up with you laterrr!!``
changeReason: New translation correctly renders JPN ボディは後から効いてくる as a boxing reference ('Body blows always catch up with you later'), while original misinterprets it as a personal complaint.

TextENGNew: ``R... Rika-chama...@k@vS07/06/330600110. Are we too late?``
``...Meep!!@k@vS07/05/330500182. Once it enters someone's stomach, it dissolves smoothly and gets absorbed right away!@k@vS07/05/330500183. We have a time limit of thirty minutes after ingestion!!``
``But at least we now have both the red and white magatama!@k@vS07/05/330500185. If we get Keiichi and Rena to the Furude Shrine, I can lift the curse immediately!``
``In that case, we need to haul these two to the shrine before something irreversible happens!``
``Come along, Mion-san, Shion-san!@k@vS07/04/330400261. We're dragging them there right now!!``
````Aye aye, ma'am!!!````
changeReason: New translation uses 'ma'am' instead of 'sir' since they are responding to Satoko's command, correctly matching the gendered address.
